title: AutoResearch explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code presents AutoResearch from Andrej Karpathy as a novel approach to software development through iterative self-improvement. The video argues that while not universally applicable, AutoResearch introduces a new lens for how teams can improve software and development workflows.
